headline: Will Meijer Takes Canada Sales Helm As Molson Coors Shares Lag Valuation
summary: Molson Coors Beverage (NYSE:TAP) has appointed Will Meijer as President, Canada Sales. Meijer returns to the company with deep experience in Molson Coors and the Canadian beverage market. The move highlights management attention on Canada as a core part of the business. For Molson Coors Beverage, trading at $42.92, this leadership change arrives after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock down 12.4% over the past month, 9.5% year to date, and 26.7% over the past year.
